reviews.comment:
Lugar optimo para parar en la ruta 9. Excelentes medialunas y sandwiches de crudo. Un desvio de 2 km de la autopista te permiten cargar combustible y energía para el viaje

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop on Route 9. Excellent croissants and ham sandwiches. A 2 km detour off the highway lets you refuel and recharge for your trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcHI3N1ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Punto clave para la recarga de combustible en el viaje Buenos Aires - Córdoba. Recomiendo el lugar para descansar en una prolija arboleda con asientos y mesas. Abierto las 24 hs.

(Translated by Google)
A key stop for refueling on the Buenos Aires - Córdoba trip. I recommend this place to rest in a well-kept grove with benches and tables. Open 24 hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRb3VlNF93RRAB

reviewer.displayName: Instituto Nuestra Señora de los Milagros

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, buen servicio e higiene.

(Translated by Google)
Good attention, good service and hygiene.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncy0yMzRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, recomiendo los sanguches de mondiola..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, I recommend the mondiola sandwiches.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, poca gente por estar fuera de la autopista. Recomiendo como parada intermedia.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, few people because it's off the highway. I recommend it as a stopover.

reviews.comment:
Estación que quedó fuera de la autopista.
Tenes q ingresar unos kilómetros, pérdida de tiempo...
Muy limpio excelente la atención de los playeros como en servicompras

(Translated by Google)
The service station is located off the highway. You have to drive a few kilometers, which is a waste of time... Very clean, excellent service from the attendants, just like at a convenience store.
